steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks why critics are skeptical. Find the passage's stated reason — it says 'it's too early to tell if they can thrive in this unusual setting,' meaning doubt centers on whether the plants can survive on the building.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'adaptability elsewhere': The passage says nothing about whether the trees could thrive in other locations. ✗
  • Choice B — 'reduced plant variety': No mention of limited diversity among the species used. ✗
  • Choice C — 'construction impact': The passage doesn't link skepticism to how building the structure affects plants. ✗
  • Choice D — 'inability to confirm plant survival': Directly restates the passage's reason — it's too early to know if the plants can thrive. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
